questionHtml: Determine the molecular formula of this compound if its molar mass is 88.12 g mol−1. If you did not obtain an answer in (a) use CS, but this is not the correct answer.
markschemeHtml:
«88.12 g mol-144.06 g mol-1=2» C4H8O2 ✔

 

C2S2 if CS used.

meta.title: Determine the molecular formula of this compound if its molar mass is 88.12 g mol−1. If you did not obtain an answer in (a) use CS, but this is not the correct answer.
